svg.title: A198 ChaCha10 shared-key eight-block two-budget boundary
svg.desc: Two complete 32-cell width-15 covers use identical eight-block SMT formulas at 10-second and 30-second budgets; all 64 bounded outcomes are UNKNOWN and no model is returned.
svg.text: Same still-secret ChaCha10 challenge · 8 shared-key blocks · 4,096 target bits per cell
Each budget executes 32 × 2¹⁵ = 2²⁰ candidates; formula bytes and hashes are identical across budgets.
Every formula observes eight counter-related blocks (4,096 target bits) under one shared unknown low-20 key value.
All 64 processes return normally, no external guard fires, and both complete covers execute without early stop.
The 10-second secondary and 30-second primary predictions are both not retained on this challenge.
UNKNOWN is not UNSAT: this is a resource/representation boundary, with no absence, recovery, or uniqueness claim.
